howItWorks.title: How It Works

steps.title: Choose Template

steps.description: Confirm your direction directly with a developer and move into fast delivery.

faqSuggestions: I want to build a website — where do I start?

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Platform stats at a glance
overview.tip1: Use the Users tab to grant or revoke admin access.
overview.tip2: Use the Content tab to edit any homepage section — all languages auto-translate via AI.
overview.tip3: Add OPENAI_API_KEY to backend/.env to enable AI translation.
